April is a strong yet gentle month for you, dear Aries. You’re in the driver’s seat. Yes, this is true in a general sense, but with the Sun in your sign until the 19th and Mars from the 9th onward, you’re not only feeling confident, but the changes you make now seem to have visible, quick results. Money, business, talents, and resources are subthemes this month, gaining more power from the 19th onward.

While you’ll be pursuing personal interests and craving more independence this month – and you’re quite successful on these fronts – there's a good part of you wanting to settle in and enjoy yourself. Getting comfortable is a strong draw, but so is building and developing.

April is a month for collecting yourself, tying up loose ends, and catching up on rest, dear Taurus, but it becomes a powerful period for personal impact and initiative as it progresses. As well, you’re getting attention with Venus in your sign until the 24th and the Sun in Taurus from the 19th forward. Personal charisma runs high, even if you’re sometimes withdrawn.

Life can be quiet, at least on the surface of things. Energy and motivation levels are not always up to par at this time, but it's a strong time to restore, rest, and reflect. Retreating from the world on some level is appropriate, as you need time to reflect on the past and envision what you’d like to do with the birthday year ahead. Some of your ambitions could be on hold just for now. Although some things feel slow, events behind the scenes are at play, conspiring to get you back into high gear. In fact, you’ll have plenty of opportunities this month to boost your spirits and emotional health through healing activities, rest, and supportive relationships. This allows you to catch up emotionally on recent events and circumstances.

While April can be a well-rounded month in many ways, dear Gemini, you are giving certain things more attention and energy this month. These include building your dreams, planting the seeds for new ventures and ideas, generating business income, and improving connections and friendships. People are taking up a lot of your time, whether they are friends, fellow group members, networks, or associates. You are more impartial than usual, and you can use this easy energy to enhance friendships. The month holds strong energy for collaboration, sharing, and learning, but you're also learning to make some special time for rest and reflection.

This month, friendship is fruitful, and networking is a rich source of ideas and support. There can be pleasant interactions with friends, or your plans and dream projects are moving forward.

The Full Moon on the 1st can bring your feelings to the surface. You might acknowledge buried feelings for someone or connect with your true feelings about a special project or pursuit. The desire to enjoy and express yourself is strong now.

Your career or responsibilities are in strong focus this month, dear Cancer, but your social sector is getting some nice attention, ensuring a pleasing balance with happiness pursuits. Your ambitions are stirring. While you have a strong sense of the rules, the enterprising side of your nature emerges powerfully this month, and you could find yourself challenging some of your traditions.

Home and family matters may reach a turning point at the beginning of April due to a Full Moon on the 1st. Striking a balance between energy spent on work and energy put into domestic matters is essential now. Balanced attention to your public and personal lives is what you need to focus on. However, this month is more about getting your responsibilities to the outside world sorted.

Support for your career, or a whole new vision of where you want your professional life to go, comes now. You’re in a goal-oriented, take-charge frame of mind! This is about your longer-term goals, larger responsibilities, and life path.

You can be active with others this month, dear Virgo, but you’re also easily absorbed in your private life, ideally finding the right balance between the two. This is also a potentially strengthening month for close relationships. You’re clearer about who you care about and who has your back. The urge for self-transformation can also be strong, and it's a fine time for kicking a bad habit and eliminating wasteful activities.

Venus harmonizes with your sign until the 24th, boosting your personal appeal. It also stimulates your taste for things that are a little out of the ordinary or non-routine. You might thoroughly enjoy cultural activities, studies, debates, and sharing your ideas with others. Taking in a show, throwing yourself into a creative project, or sharing time with others can be rewarding, for example. Sharing your feelings or intimate matters can also be an empowering theme for you in April. You might open up a topic that is usually left unspoken. Healthy, frank discussions boost your relationships.

Much of your attention turns to improving your close relationships in April, dear Libra. It may be best to give the stage to others in some ways and put your personal projects on the back burner for now.

The Full Moon on the 1st happens in your sign, giving you a cosmic push to rework your image or redefine yourself, perhaps to reflect recent inner changes. Your emotions are on your sleeve. However, much of the month's energy is about building your connections. Partnerships are in sharp focus and can be supportive and spirited. Good energy is with you for socializing, connecting, and enjoying the people in your life, but it’s also a time when you’re ready and willing to go deeper. Absorbing hobbies, relationships, and activities can be a strong draw.

At the same time, facing reality on a matter can figure strongly with an emphasis on your partnership sector where Saturn is visiting. It’s a good time to reflect on what you're learning about others and yourself through the lens of a relationship.

Creative and physical activities thrive this month, dear Scorpio, especially in the first half of the month. You may find it easy and natural to attract positive attention. Romantic inclinations can be strong, or passions run high. Recreation, leisure, love, and hobbies are in the spotlight, but so are work, self-care, and chores. The month is strong not only for finding work, but also for relationships on the job.

For the most part in April, you’re busy, engaged, and dividing your time well. Doing your best work and taking pride in what you do are themes, while special attention to your need to express and enjoy yourself is rarely lacking.

Your solar sixth house is a great area of focus in April, and with Saturn and Neptune new long-term guests in this area of your solar chart, you're aiming not only for more realism and discipline while pursuing your work and wellness goals, but also for inspiration. Find ways to tighten your routines, but leave some room for gaining motivation and a sense of mission. It’s a fine time to make a real dent in your to-do list. You have planetary support for your efforts as long as you pay attention to the message of the Full Moon on the 1st – you also need to make time for spiritual and emotional renewal. Recognize how spiritual health impacts the rest of your life, and it becomes impossible to ignore.

Sagittarius datesare approximately from November 22 to December 21. However, it’s important to note that all Sun sign dates are approximate since they change from year to year. In other words, they’re dependent on your birth year, and in some cases, birth time. If your birth date is on or near either of these dates, then you may have a Sagittarius Sun sign or something else (Scorpio or Capricorn). Be certain with the following tool:What’s My Sun Sign?

You've been paying a lot of attention to family and career matters recently, dear Sagittarius, and at times, the juggling act you've been doing may have been stressful. Fortunately, you're in a more easygoing and self-expressive period this month. Opportunities to enjoy yourself are plenty in April, with the month's strong emphasis on your sector of romance, recreation, creativity, and joy. Your mood is playful, and others more readily appreciate your unique romantic and creative style.

You’re likely to enjoy a comfortable sense of progress this month. With planetary influences pushing for both work and play, you may very well reach an ideal balance. It’s difficult to find you in a state of boredom this month.

This month, activities in and around your home or involving your family take up much of your time, dear Capricorn. April brings a special focus on your personal life, love, and leisure. It’s a time to make memories with family and special people in your life. While introspection is in order, you have Venus in your sector of joy until the 24th, and the Sun there from the 19th onward, and you’re making time for living life well.

Events and circumstances occurring around the Full Moon on the 1st can give you a cosmic push to handle professional matters or to review your career goals. At a moment’s notice, you may be called to perform or meet a responsibility.

The month ahead brings you excellent energy for connecting, learning, and sharing, dear Aquarius, as well as for improving and enjoying your domestic world. Your projects, studies, and personal interests continue to gather momentum this month, and you can bring more harmony and warmth to your home and family relationships.

With Venus in your solar fourth house until the 24th, you may more thoroughly enjoy the comforts of home and the familiarity of family and loved ones. A special emphasis on your communication sector makes April a fine month to scope out various prospects and ideas. Putting your feelers out makes a lot of sense this month.

Financial matters are in focus in April, dear Pisces, and so are comfort, security, communication, and transportation. In the month ahead, you can be busy building your resources, acquiring things that have long-term “shelf life”, and discovering ways to make more money or manage what you have. Sensual pleasures appeal more than usual. Your practical world assumes more importance this month, although mental stimulation is also a strong theme.

You can take pride in your belongings, income, or talents, and you may be looking to use your assets more to your advantage. Circumstances also raise your mood and encourage positive thinking more frequently in April.

Jointly-held assets and intimacy may be in strong and sudden focus around the Full Moon on the 1st. It urges you to get in touch with your true feelings about a relationship or a situation. Straightening out matters of support, ownership, dependency, or debt can be in the spotlight.
